---
sidebar: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  fields: ["image", "title", "description", "date", "categories"]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {layout="[21,79]" .profile-header}

![](profile.jpg){.profile-pic}

\
\
Hello, I'm Tim Koval.\
I'm a Research and Development Engineer who loves to discover effective ways of building complex things. Mostly into Machine Learning, Robotics and all sorts of exciting R&D tasks where scientific outcomes are estimated.\
[Email me](mailto:timkoval00@gmail.com) if you have anything to discuss and read more from the posts listed below.
:::

---
